title: centunculus minimus
intro: Centunculus minimus, also known as lesser celandine, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Centunculus minimus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
